nasb.text: In the twenty-third year of Joash the son of Ahaziah, king of Judah, Jehoahaz the son of Jehu became king over Israel at Samaria, and he reigned seventeen years.

esv.text: In the twenty-third year of Joash the son of Ahaziah, king of Judah, Jehoahaz the son of Jehu began to reign over Israel in Samaria, and he reigned seventeen years.

cnv.text: 猶大王亞哈謝的兒子約阿施在位第二十三年，耶戶的兒子約哈斯在撒瑪利亞登基，統治以色列共十七年。

ccb.text: 犹大王亚哈谢的儿子约阿施执政第二十三年，耶户的儿子约哈斯在撒玛利亚登基做以色列王，执政十七年。
